name: glama-status-mcp
description: Daily-refreshed Glama score tracker for the sandraschi fleet. Scrapes per-tool TDQS grades from glama.ai, stores in SQLite with snapshot history, surfaces via MCP tools and a Vite/React web dashboard.

tools.name: glama_status
tools.description: Portmanteau: list, get, worst_tools, refresh, history, staleness, report, deltas

tools.name: glama_scores_summary
tools.description: Compact fleet-wide score summary with grade distribution

tools.name: glama_daily_report
tools.description: Full markdown daily report: grade table, score deltas, worst tools, stale repos

tools.name: show_glama_status_card
tools.description: Prefab UI card - fleet overview dashboard

tools.name: show_glama_repo_card
tools.description: Prefab UI card - per-repo score breakdown with tool list
